name: Sanofi pitch deck directive (v1.0.1)
what_it_solves: Directive JSON that generates the Sanofi pitch deck — anchor asset SAR445953 (SGN-CEACAM5C).
how_it_solves: sanofiPitchDeckDirective.json enumerates each slide's canon (asset details, evidence receipts to cite, claims allowed).
why_it_exists: Prevents slide-authoring drift by making the pitch deck a downstream artefact of a canonical JSON, not a hand-crafted document.
